generated_oml:
instance MotorTorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring torque in motors of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorTorqueDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors monitoring temperature in gearboxes of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance BaseAxisPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors tracking position of the first vertical axis at the base of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BaseAxisPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorTorqueSensor
    base:desc "Motor torque time series data streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance GearboxTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxTemperatureSensor
    base:desc "Gearbox temperature time series data streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance BaseAxisPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BaseAxisPositionSensor
    base:desc "Base axis position time series data streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance MotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time torque data from motors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorTorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RFLPMethodology, SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearboxTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from gearboxes"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RFLPMethodology, SimulinkEnabler
]

instance BaseAxisPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time position data from first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BaseAxisPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RFLPMethodology, MontiArcAutomatonEnabler
]

]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcAutomatonEnabler
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLStateMachineEnabler

instance RFLPMethodology : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics) methodology for multi-level abstraction across requirements, functional, logical, and product layers"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling across requirements, functional, logical, and technical abstraction layers"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

    base:desc "ACME Architecture Description Language for component interfaces and composition"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance AADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL Architecture Description Language for component interfaces and interconnections"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance MontiArcEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Architecture Description Language for component composition"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavioral modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance SysMLStateMachineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML state machines for behavioral modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for analytical simulations"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance CppEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for detailed behavior specification"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceService

instance JavaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java for detailed behavior specification"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceService

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of industrial robot performance through live-data linking"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStatusInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard interface for visualizing robot status and performance metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationDashboardInsight
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction to enable predictive maintenance and performance optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionInsight, PredictiveMaintenanceAction
]

instance SystemStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time status monitoring of MABI MAX 100 robot components"
]

instance VisualizationDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of robot performance metrics for operators"
]

instance JointFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of joint friction characteristics affecting robot performance"
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated maintenance scheduling based on joint friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MABIMAX100RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "MABI MAX 100 industrial robot system in machining operations environment"
    base:contains MotorComponent, GearboxComponent, BaseAxisComponent
]

instance MotorComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor component of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance GearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearbox component of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance BaseAxisComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First vertical axis at the base of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system is structured using the Digital Shadow Reference Model (Fig. 1), a UML class diagram defining components including Asset (physical entity), Model (mathematical representation), Processing (data transformation logic), and DataTrace (sensor data streams). The Concrete Digital Shadow Model (Fig. 5) implements these elements with real-time data streaming via MQTT and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for standardized data exchange within the manufacturing context."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for sensor data transmission. Network topology, bandwidth requirements, latency specifications, reliability and redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system complies with industry standards including SysML [17] for system modeling, ACME [23], AADL [24], MontiArc [25,26], and SysML IBDs [17,27] as architecture description languages (ADLs) for component and connector perspectives. Additionally, methodologies such as RFLP [18,19], OOSEM [20], SPES [21], and SMArDT [22] are applied to manage complexity across abstraction levels (requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, product/technical layer)."
]
